source_lock.drift_handling: any mismatch on repo/path/commit/schema_version/any hash fails closed (refuses refresh, non-zero exit); a schema_version or row-count/coverage_summary change requires re-review of this design, not just a hash check

rejected.A_byte_identical_mirror_only: insufficient alone -- no Forecast-owned slot for identity-resolution status, phase-eligibility tags, or refresh provenance
rejected.C_normalized_forecast_adapter: premature at mirror stage -- normalization implies feature-design decisions reserved for a later, separate experiment-design issue; a model-ready feature table is explicitly out of scope

mirror_form.payload_transformation: none; byte-identical copy of JSON, CSV, and manifest
mirror_form.permitted_differences_from_source: none in mirrored payload bytes; wrapper is a wholly additive sibling file
mirror_form.parity_validation: sha256 of each mirrored file must equal source_lock.artifact_hashes on every refresh

row_grain.player_id_note: TIBER-Rookies player_id is a position-prefixed name slug, locally scoped; no verified crosswalk to any Forecast/canonical (gsis_id-equivalent) player identity is known to exist
row_grain.corroboration_role: may only corroborate an already-asserted identity, never serve as the join key or a fallback for a failed player_id join

join_failure_handling.missing_forecast_player_id: row retained in mirror for audit only, marked identity_status=unresolved_to_forecast_population, excluded from any feature-bearing join
join_failure_handling.duplicate_ids: independently re-verified on every refresh (not trusted from upstream); fail closed if found
join_failure_handling.season_mismatch: row rejected for that rehearsal; no cross-season carry-forward defined for this artifact
join_failure_handling.source_rows_absent_from_forecast_populat: expected and reported (counted), not silently dropped
join_failure_handling.forecast_players_absent_from_source: expected and reported (counted), not silently dropped

field_classification.assumption: all classifications assume identity resolution (row_grain) already succeeded for that row; an unresolved-identity row is audit-only regardless of field

families.future_eligibility: structurally could become eligible for controlled experimentation in a future, separate design (pre-draft-safe by nature)
structurally could become eligible in a future design (pre-draft-safe)
structurally could become eligible in a future design (pre-draft-safe)
structurally could become eligible in a future design (pre-draft-safe)
blocked from any pre_draft-phase view permanently; eligibility in a post_draft context is separate future work, not authorized here

temporal_eligibility.leakage_risk_named: this promoted snapshot was itself generated (2026-07-10T12:00:00+00:00) after the 2026 draft concluded, commingling pre-draft-origin and post-draft-origin facts in one file; artifact generated_at must never be used as a proxy for per-field knowability

timestamp_non_interchangeability.provenance_last_verified_at: genuine event-adjacent verification date only for official_postdraft_outcome drafted rows (carries source ingested_at); a generation-date fallback or null for every other case -- must not be read as true verification for those
timestamp_non_interchangeability.future_mirror_refreshed_at: Forecast-side operational bookkeeping only, never usable to infer real-world fact knowability

dae_quan_wright_null_last_verified_at.conservative_assumption: exact knowable-as-of date is unknown; any date-sensitive post_draft rehearsal must obtain an independently-sourced signing date or exclude this row from that specific analysis

pre_draft.definition: as-of time strictly before the 2026 NFL draft's conclusion
pre_draft.official_postdraft_outcome: must be excluded entirely -- physically absent from any pre_draft-tagged view, not merely nulled or flagged

post_draft.definition: as-of time at or after the 2026 NFL draft's conclusion (and, for te-daequan-wright specifically, no earlier than an independently-sourced UDFA-signing date)
post_draft.draft_capital: eligible, subject to the audit-only ceiling in field_classification
post_draft.age_athletic_production: eligible, subject to the same ceiling
post_draft.official_postdraft_outcome: eligible, subject to the same ceiling

temporal_eligibility.representation: both structurally in the mirror schema (pre_draft view physically omits official_postdraft_outcome) AND documented in this design as a separate eligibility contract -- deliberately redundant
temporal_eligibility.fails_closed_because: ambiguous or unavailable timestamps default to exclusion, not inclusion-with-caveat; an excluded row/field can be added back once resolved, a leaked one cannot be un-leaked from a training run

observed_vs_inferred.draft_capital: inferred market-derived proxy; never overwritten by or merged with official_postdraft_outcome
prohibited: overwriting the proxy with the official outcome
collapsing both into one polymorphic draft-capital feature
converting provenance notes into numeric features
deriving a composite evidence score during mirroring

missingness.default: unavailable remains unavailable at the mirror stage
missingness.note: a model, once wired in a later separate issue, may still numerically default a null feature to 0 for arithmetic reasons at training time (matching existing player-history precedent) -- that is a future, explicitly-reviewed decision, not something this mirror design authorizes

required: full per-field {value, provenance} structure for every family
source_type, source_name, source_url, confidence, confidence_band, last_verified_at (including null), notes

validation_contract_for_future_mirror: source lock and hash validation, fail closed on any mismatch
deterministic reproduction (byte-identical mirror + wrapper apart from mirror_refreshed_at)
47 drafted + 1 udfa_signed outcome parity, re-verified against mirrored JSON
JSON/CSV agreement (identical player_id population and order)
no duplicate or fuzzy identity resolution
observed/inferred provenance preservation with no cross-contamination
temporal-eligibility assertions (pre_draft view omits official_postdraft_outcome; te-daequan-wright last_verified_at stays null)
source drift fails closed (simulated hash mismatch test)
no model or production imports reference the mirror (repo-wide import check)

lifecycle_placement.current_stage: between owned_source_artifact (done) and mirror_rehearsal_path (this design governs the next issue)
future_issues_required: production binding, only if evidence supports it, with explicit human sign-off

decision_scope: authorizes only a separate, bounded mirror-implementation issue conforming to the selected mirror form and validation contract; does not authorize experimentation, feature activation, predictive use, downstream consumption, production binding, or UI activation
non_goals: no fixture written under data/fixtures/tiberRookies/ (path proposed, not created)
no claim that any field improves MAE, RMSE, calibration, or fantasy-point prediction
no TIBER-Rookies change of any kind
no canonical player-ID crosswalk built (gap named, not closed)
